name: Monsarrat Shave Ice
tagline: All-natural organic fruit purees — syrups so thick they layer them in as they build your cone.
parking: Street parking on Monsarrat — look for spots near the Kapiolani Park side
talkStory: This is a labor-of-love operation, tiny setup. The owner is passionate about using only Hawaiian-grown ingredients when possible. Pair with a Diamond Head hike — finish the trail, walk down Monsarrat, reward yourself. Limited hours: Fri–Sun 11am–4pm typically, but check their Instagram @monsarratshaveice before going — they close for rain and sometimes take random weeks off.
